verses.text: Tola judges Israel twenty-three years. Tola. A quiet judge.
Tola judges Israel twenty-three years. Tola. A quiet judge.
Jair judges twenty-two years. Jair. Another season of rest.
Jair judges twenty-two years. Jair. Another season of rest.
Jair judges twenty-two years. Jair. Another season of rest.
Israel serves many gods; the Ammonites oppress them. Apostasy. Many idols, much misery.
Israel serves many gods; the Ammonites oppress them. Apostasy. Many idols, much misery.
Israel serves many gods; the Ammonites oppress them. Apostasy. Many idols, much misery.
Israel serves many gods; the Ammonites oppress them. Apostasy. Many idols, much misery.
They cry; God says, 'Go cry unto the gods which ye have chosen.' Rebuke. He tests their repentance.
They cry; God says, 'Go cry unto the gods which ye have chosen.' Rebuke. He tests their repentance.
They cry; God says, 'Go cry unto the gods which ye have chosen.' Rebuke. He tests their repentance.
They cry; God says, 'Go cry unto the gods which ye have chosen.' Rebuke. He tests their repentance.
They cry; God says, 'Go cry unto the gods which ye have chosen.' Rebuke. He tests their repentance.
They put away their idols and serve the LORD. Repentance. They turn back in earnest.
They put away their idols and serve the LORD. Repentance. They turn back in earnest.
The Ammonites gather; Gilead seeks a captain. Seeking. They need a deliverer.
The Ammonites gather; Gilead seeks a captain. Seeking. They need a deliverer.
